_meta.note: Import via docs/index.html → Import progress, or paste import snippet from docs/handoff-rollout-state.md

completed_tasks.title: Operator station: clone foss-setup and verify SSH/scp
Set Kagi as the default search engine (anytime)
Version-controlled dotfiles with chezmoi — MacBook bootstrap
Back up your UniFi config (the Zone-Based Firewall is a one-way door)
Create the VLAN networks
Create matching Wi-Fi SSIDs and assign switch ports
Enable the Zone-Based Firewall and review the migration
Define zones and assign each VLAN
Create firewall policies in priority order
Configure mDNS proxy and IGMP snooping (keep casting + smart home working)
Install Tailscale on Ubuntu Server (Mac mini)
Install Tailscale on the NAS and phone
Install Tailscale on the CachyOS rig and your laptop
Verify peers are direct (not DERP-relayed)
Run an end-to-end connectivity health check
UniFi security extras: IDS/IPS, WPA3, per-SSID mapping
Enable Tailscale SSH for key-less, ACL-gated admin access
SSH key + ~/.ssh/config fallback across all hosts (break-glass)
Pre-flight: audit three Basic volumes and map library paths
Prepare vol2 & vol3 Basic pools (wipe only if unorganized)
Create DSM shares on each Basic volume (+ Btrfs settings)
Enable Container Manager on the NAS (Docker/Compose prerequisite)
Network-drive schema: SMB/NFS exports, groups, and permissions
Enable Btrfs Snapshot Replication on NAS shares
Install Docker Engine + Compose plugin on Ubuntu (Mac mini)
Create the shared edge network and /opt/stacks layout
Provision seedbox "Betty" — Bytesized Stream +3 (Deluge + slskd later)
Seedbox = Deluge only: install Deluge + create label folders
Put the seedbox on Tailscale (userspace networking)
rclone SFTP mount of the seedbox files (persistent + self-healing)
Deploy the NAS media-automation *arr stack (phased, pinned)
Wire remote Deluge + Remote Path Mappings + root folders (all *arrs)
Apply TRaSH quality profiles + naming via Recyclarr (Ubuntu → NAS *arrs)
Music pipeline — Lidarr only (no beets/slskd/Soularr)
Books pipeline — Readarr + self-hosted rreading-glasses -> CWA
Unpackerr — extract archived releases for the *arrs
Manual lane — the ONE scheduled rclone copy job
Media-automation self-check (report violations, don't silently fix)
Deploy Plex Media Server on the NAS (libraries + Quick Sync)
Deploy Seerr media request portal (home, Mac mini)
Connect Seerr to NAS Sonarr/Radarr (movies/TV — not music)
End-to-end pipeline verification (Seerr → Deluge → NAS import → Plex)
Decommission the old home torrent stack (qBittorrent/Gluetun + dual-LAN + 5Mbps cap)
Deploy MusicSeerr on Mac mini (album request portal)
Connect MusicSeerr to NAS Lidarr + Plex/Navidrome
Deploy slskd on Betty (Soulseek P2P off-site)
Deploy Soularr on NAS (Lidarr ↔ remote slskd bridge)
Deploy AdGuard Home network DNS filtering (chosen over Pi-hole)
Deploy Dockge container manager (chosen default; Dockhand is optional upgrade)
Deploy ntfy push-notification backbone
Deploy Beszel monitoring hub + agent
Self-host Forgejo (config-as-code forge) on the Ubuntu box
Deploy Miniflux + PostgreSQL
Deploy Navidrome music streaming
Deploy Mealie (recipes, meal planning, shopping lists)
Deploy Caddy reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS
Deploy Uptime Kuma uptime monitoring
Deploy Homepage — one dashboard (your observability + the household front door)
Commit the whole Docker stack to Git (rebuildable in an hour)
Fleet maintenance with Ansible (run one command across every box)
Self-converging fleet with ansible-pull + roles (the set-and-forget layer)
Deploy OWASP Dependency-Track v5 (the SBOM / vulnerability dashboard)
Nightly SBOMs with Syft + Grype, uploaded to Dependency-Track
Track /etc in Git with etckeeper (auto-commit on every package op)
Export package manifests, cron jobs & timers to the control repo
Encrypt + harden DNS (Unbound recursive + DoT, block bypass, second resolver)
Deploy Immich on Synology Container Manager (pinned, Quick Sync + OpenVINO)

partial_or_deferred.sbom-02: mini timer + NAS cron active; rig not done. First mini scan may still be running.
partial_or_deferred.glue-04b: chezmoi fleet on rig+mini — not started
